summary: Iteration 7 testing complete. All 5 major features verified: 1) Registration form with Coach/Coachee tabs and all required fields, 2) Coachee profile visible in coach's pending request card, 3) Session notes feature for completed sessions, 4) Homepage public stats (coaches, coachees, sessions), 5) Admin MIS reporting dashboard with coach occupancy, coachee status, location/BU distribution charts.
critical_code_review_comments: Registration: POST /api/registrations correctly creates pending registration with all profile fields
Registration: Duplicate email prevention works for both existing users and pending registrations
Registration: Coach nomination creates separate pending registrations for nominated coachees
Registration: Admin approval creates user account with default password 'password123'
Session Notes: POST /api/sessions/{id}/notes correctly validates session is completed before allowing notes
Session Notes: Unauthorized users (not coach/coachee of session) get 403
Public Stats: GET /api/public/stats works without authentication
Admin MIS: Returns coach_occupancy, coachee_statuses, location_distribution, business_unit_distribution, nomination_breakdown
Coachee Profile: Stored in coaching_requests.coachee_profile with tier, designation, location, business_unit, competency, enrolment_type, reason_for_enrolment
Frontend: Registration form has proper data-testid attributes for all fields
Frontend: Session notes toggle and inline notes display working correctly
Frontend: Admin Dashboard has Registrations tab with approve/reject buttons and MIS Reports tab with tables and charts
seed_data_creation: Test registrations created during backend testing (test_coachee_*, test_coach_*, test_approve_*, test_reject_*). One approved user can login with default password.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 7 features tested and working: 1) Registration form: Both Coach and Coachee tabs work, all fields present with data-testid attributes, coach can nominate coachees. 2) Coachee profile: Displayed in coach's pending request card showing tier, designation, location, BU, competency, enrolment type. 3) Session notes: Toggle button on completed sessions, inline notes display, add note functionality works. 4) Public stats: Shows on login page (6 coaches, 3 coachees, 6 sessions). 5) Admin MIS: Coach Occupancy table, Coachee Status Report table, Location Distribution chart, Business Unit Distribution chart all working.

session_notes.test_coach_can_add_note: PASS - Coach can add notes to their sessions

registration_form.coach_nomination_fields: PASS - Nominee name, email, add button present
registration_form.reason_hidden_for_coach: PASS - Reason field hidden when Coach tab selected

admin_dashboard.registrations_tab: PASS - Shows pending registrations with approve/reject buttons
admin_dashboard.mis_tab: PASS - Shows Coach Occupancy and Coachee Status tables

session_notes.notes_toggle_button: PASS - Notes button on each completed session
session_notes.notes_section_expand: PASS - Notes section expands on click
session_notes.existing_notes_display: PASS - Shows notes from backend tests

features_verified.registration_form_coach: VERIFIED - All fields + nomination section for coachees
features_verified.registration_backend_crud: VERIFIED - POST creates pending, GET lists (admin only), PUT approve/reject work
features_verified.registration_duplicate_prevention: VERIFIED - Blocks duplicate emails for users and pending registrations
features_verified.coach_nomination_creates_registrations: VERIFIED - Nominated coachees get separate pending registrations
features_verified.coachee_profile_in_request: VERIFIED - Stored in coachee_profile field with all profile data
features_verified.coachee_profile_display: VERIFIED - Coach sees tier, designation, location, BU, competency, enrolment type in pending request card
features_verified.session_notes_post: VERIFIED - POST /api/sessions/{id}/notes adds note to completed session
features_verified.session_notes_restrictions: VERIFIED - Cannot add notes to non-completed session (400), unauthorized users blocked (403)
features_verified.session_notes_ui: VERIFIED - Notes toggle button on completed sessions, inline notes display
